divergence_from_c:
Three divergences:

  1. Visibility: C is `static`; the TS port lives in src/internal/mpfr/ (substrate territory).

  2. Return type: C void (mutates s) -> TS object (returns fresh state).

  3. Storage: C uses mpz_t (heap-allocated GMP); TS uses BigInt. mpz_init creates a zero-valued mpz; the TS equivalent is just creating 0n bigints.
refs: mpfr/src/const_euler.c L51-L60 -- the C reference body.
mpfr/src/const_euler.c L39-L49 -- the struct definition (6 mpz_t fields).
